steps.title: Locate petri dish 6 in the venom-treated column
steps.content: The question asks for the CFU count from petri dish 6 in the venom-treated bacteria chamber. Find row 6 in the first column, then read the value in the rightmost column labeled “CFUs after treatment with venom.”

steps.title: Read the value and eliminate the other choices
steps.content: The table shows 153 CFUs for petri dish 6 in the venom column — choice A. The other values don't appear in this row; they either aren't in the table at all or belong to different rows or the saline column. That matches choice A — A is correct.
